profile.tagline: Full-stack AI Engineer. Building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI, IoT, and web technologies.

experience.title: Software Engineer - II
bullets: Developing generative AI-powered tools for the insurance domain and automating claims processing workflows.
Building agentic AI pipelines leveraging RAG and MCP to deliver context-aware, multi-step reasoning systems.
Developing a prompt-to-video generation engine that transforms natural language inputs into structured video content.

experience.title: R&D Engineer
bullets: Led a 3-member engineering team in designing and shipping a sports and drills management dashboard built on NextJS and Supabase.
Engineered an IoT-based monitoring system for school playrooms, delivering real-time activity tracking and live status updates.
Built a deep learning model for automated drill activity recognition using pose estimation, improving assessment accuracy.

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
bullets: Developed and published a Python package for the e-learning division, enabling scalable AI course delivery.
Produced technical course content using the Manim library, creating programmatic animations for complex ML concepts.
Delivered one-on-one mentoring sessions in Python programming and applied AI/ML, supporting learner progression from fundamentals to project work.

projects.title: Sports & Drills Dashboard
projects.description: Online sports and drills management web dashboard for monitoring physical education activities in schools.

projects.title: Drill Activity Detection
projects.description: Deep learning model to detect physical education drill activity using pose estimation techniques.

projects.title: Playroom Monitoring System
projects.description: Hardware solution to monitor activities of kids' playrooms in schools with live updates and real-time alerts.

projects.title: AI E-Learning Package
projects.description: Python package for e-learning division to support students with AI course content and programmatic animations.

skills.items: PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, Keras, Pandas, TinyML
React, NextJS, Node.js, FastAPI, Tailwind CSS

education.description: Specialization in Connected Systems & Intelligence. Focused on AI/ML applications in sports technology and IoT-based monitoring systems.
Core computer science curriculum with focus on programming fundamentals, data structures, and software engineering principles.
